title: SSE reconnect never sends Last-Event-ID; missed updates silently lost
description: Trigger: any SSE disconnect followed by reconnect. run_sse_stream always calls subscribe_events(url, None), never tracking the last SseFrame::id and never passing it as Last-Event-ID on reconnect. Per RFC 8620 §7.3 the server cannot replay missed StateChange events without Last-Event-ID. Bad behavior: all state changes (new messages, chat updates) that occurred during the disconnect window are silently lost — they will never trigger a sync — until the next SSE event happens to arrive after the reconnect.
